typecheck.command: npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/client/tsconfig.json

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require behavior-level automated assertions for each corrected user-facing option path during scrutiny fixes (not only interface/type-shape checks), especially for export/capture semantics.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of `fix-export-scrutiny` found code-level fixes for department filtering, salary toggle behavior, and viewport-fit capture, but added tests remained context/type-oriented and did not directly assert these three behaviors end-to-end.
